en.extract:
The bamboo woodpecker, or Gecinulus viridis, is a species of bird in the family Picidae. It is found in Myanmar, Laos, Thailand and Malaysia. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical dry forests and subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests.


References

Picture - Oriental Bird Club Images.  [1]

The '''bamboo woodpecker''', or '''''Gecinulus viridis''''', is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Woodpecker|Picidae]]. It is found in [[Myanmar]], [[Laos]], [[Thailand]] and [[Malaysia]]. Its natural [[habitat]]s are subtropical or tropical dry [[forest]]s and subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests.
